ddls:
CREATE TABLE "battery_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_duration" REAL /* Duration of the test in hours */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment conditions during the test */,
  "test_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the test */,
  "test_operator" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_tests_test_operator FOREIGN KEY ("test_operator") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_tests_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batteries" (
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the battery model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the battery */,
  "capacity_mAh" INTEGER /* Rated capacity of the battery in milliamp hours */,
  "voltage_rating" REAL /* Rated voltage of the battery */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery (e.g., Li-ion, NiMH) */,
  "battery_weight" REAL /* Weight of the battery */,
  "battery_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the battery */,
  "battery_materials" TEXT /* Materials used in the battery */,
  "battery_production_date" TEXT /* Date of battery production */,
  "battery_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the battery */,
  "battery_warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated test */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the battery during the test */,
  "jump_to" INTEGER /* Jump to the next test phase */,
  "cycle" INTEGER /* Cycle number of the test */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Step in the test */,
  "cur_mA" REAL /* Current in milliamperes */,
  "voltage_V" REAL /* Voltage in volts */,
  "capacity_mAh" INTEGER /* Capacity in milliamp hours */,
  "energy_mWh" REAL /* Energy in milliamp hours */,
  "relative_time" TEXT /* Relative time since the test started */,
  "absolute_time" TEXT /* Exact date and time of the record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the test */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the test */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure during the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the record was taken */,
  "test_note" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_records_step FOREIGN KEY ("step") REFERENCES steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_records_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES battery_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_records_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_records_cycle FOREIGN KEY ("cycle") REFERENCES cycles ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "test_duration_min" INTEGER /* Minimum duration of the test in minutes */,
  "test_duration_max" INTEGER /* Maximum duration of the test in minutes */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for the test */,
  "test_equipment_needed" TEXT /* Equipment needed for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Code for the status */,
  "status_color" TEXT /* Color code for the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cycle */,
  "cycle_name" TEXT /* Name of the cycle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cycle */,
  "cycle_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the cycle in minutes */,
  "cycle_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions during the cycle */,
  "cycle_equipment_needed" TEXT /* Equipment needed for the cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "step_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the step in minutes */,
  "step_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions during the step */,
  "step_equipment_needed" TEXT /* Equipment needed for the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_logs" (
  "energy_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy log entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated test */,
  "energy_mWh" REAL /* Energy measured in milliwatt-hours */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the energy log was taken */,
  "test_note" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the energy log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES battery_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated test */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the performance report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_author" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES battery_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_report_author FOREIGN KEY ("report_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
